there's country that might have insight into what post-ACTA future look like, it's Republic Korea.
Korea known having most advanced networks world, more recently also been recipient some strongest foreign pressure ramp laws.
Heesob member (and former Chair) IPLeft, Korean digital rights activist group founded 1999 critique increasingly maximalist rights agenda that country, research present alternative policy proposals.
writes impact Korea ACTA other international agreements.
August 2008, group, IPLeft, demanded that Korean government disclose relevant information about stance negotiation ACTA.
disclosure denied, appeal.
reason denial unconvincing: disclosure, were told, would result harmful effect diplomatic relationship with foreign countries severe damage considerable national interests".
does participation international cooperation combat trade "counterfeit pirated goods" harmfully impact foreign relationships?
Which national interests damaged open transparent discussion?
Unlike attitude civic society general public, turned that Korean government already provided relevant information sought opinions from, particular business groups from earliest stages negotiation, least from November 2007.
When comes ACTA, transparency openness became principles that apply only small number business interests.
This secrecy ACTA bad: mirrors particular perspective that views system intellectual property means maximizing commercial profit which pays little attention broader social, cultural economic implications system.
This imbalanced biased approach infused into draft texts that have seen.
draft chapters civil enforcement, criminal enforcement, border measures lack procedural justice fairness.
They improperly promote interests holders detriment other party civil, criminal administrative proceedings.
provisions contained proposed Internet Chapter appear impose undue obligations ISPs.
extent which ISPs liable copyright infringement users matter domestic cultural policy, trade issue.
Careful balancing interests fine-tuning necessary, including factors specific local culture environment which cannot concluded closed room occupied trade negotiators.
More significantly, liability ISPs great importance merely protection copyright: important protection realization everyone's right take part cultural life declared legally binding international human rights instruments.
concerns about ACTA risk undercutting principle rule possible conflict with human rights, particular with right fair trial, right equality before courts tribunals, right equality arms, right presumed innocent.
ACTA tries introduce substantial changes civil criminal procedures.
proposed changes give rise issues procedural justice fairness, jeopardizing Korea's obligations under international human rights instruments, e.g., International Covenant Civil Political Rights, potentially weakening democratic values recognized Constitution.
instance, pursuant US-Japan joint proposal, provisional measures such preliminary injunction rendered judicial authorities without prior hearing alleged infringer.
Here, neither "irreparable harm right holder" demonstrable risk evidence being destroyed" explicitly required.
Even Customs office take ex-officio action suspend release suspected copyright trademark infringing goods.
Moreover, right holders awarded predetermined amount damages without having burden show amount damage even when amount greater than actual damage.
even more severe breach principles procedural justice found so-called "camcorder provision" under which anyone attempts audiovisual recording device make copy part audiovisual work theater criminally punished.
This out-of-proportion rule only produces direct conflict with right presumed innocent also undermines principle fair fair dealing.
National autonomy vital order decide proper level local protection enforcement.
Korean undergone substantial revision threat trade sanctions from both since early 1980s.
This economic coercion continued about thirty years, emergence consistent domestic pressure stronger protection.
Interestingly, strongest advocates these reforms Korea industries: they executive branches government which claim competance over administration patent, trademark, copyright.
them, stronger protection enforcement chance enhance their position.
unending economic pressure heavy reliance domestic economy upon exports have produced this environment.
problem that these state actors much more influential than other, emerging local businesses, because they possess institutional capacities resources promote maximalist regulatory culture.
With this power, these government agencies have introduced laws Korea which well used support controversial provisions currently being discussed Guadalajara, Mexico.
Examples include filtering obligation imposed certain online service providers, "graduated response" rule under which Minister Culture suspend terminate Internet account repeat infringer even shut down website that repeat infringer using.
Advocates claim that shutting-down provision incorporated US-Korea Free Trade Agreement (and Side Letters) (currently awaiting ratification), possibly pushed modified form during ACTA negotiations.
ACTA concluded with inspiration such provisions applied Korea under name international harmony, effort reform copyright system would undermined, opportunities democratic policy discussion local level would lost.
Contrary beliefs ACTA negotiators, stronger, criminal enforcement rules create unintended consequences among general public.
Korea, following introduction these laws, reports criminal copyright infringement skyrocketed from 14,838 90,979 between 2005 2008.
Among these, juveniles victims occupied 2008, increase from 1.9% 2005.
This reported increase, however, does represent rapid rise unauthorized copyrighted material juveniles.
Rather, shows criminal sanctions misused.
Under Korean Copyright Act, unauthorized acts reproduction distribution copyrighted works invoke criminal liability.
This wide coverage criminal sanction paves abuse misuse criminal enforcement.
ACTA different this sense.
order "willful copyright piracy" under ACTA, infringing activity needs commercial scale".
commercial scale defined broadly that covers activities with direct indirect motivation financial gain".
With this broad definition, infringement commercial scale include almost every unauthorized copyrighted work.
instance, those download single piece music risk criminal penalties.
other words, ACTA opens door global misuse criminal enforcement rules, beyond even what we've seen Korea.
Here, criminal sanctions have become sort business model lawyers acting copyright holders (mainly music film industries).
They monitor Internet users send warning letters suspected individuals threatening criminal action.
exchange taking criminal action, they cash settlement.
Criminal enforcement procedures provide copyright holders with leverage; using threat criminal action leverage settlement negotiation initiation criminal procedure triggered complaint right holder.
Among 90,979 complaints 2008, were settled court.
ACTA risks exporting Korea's criminal enforcement regime, while importing worst other countries' laws.
that's only reason oppose
trade agreement that breaches procedural justice, fairness, transparency, proportionality Anti-Counterfeiting: it's Anti-Commons.
